title: terminalLauncher.ts — Ghostty/iTerm2/Terminal.app/generic
description: Detect installed terminals via mdfind/which. launchTerminal({terminal,command,cwd,newWindow,title}) API. Per-terminal: Ghostty URL scheme, iTerm2/Terminal AppleScript, generic -e. Refuse-with-hint on missing binary.
